● Led a team of 4 to build an AI-powered resume and job-description analyzer processing 5,000+ documents to compute
skill-match scores, detect skill gaps, and generate personalized learning-path recommendations.
● Built a PDF/OCR pipeline using PyMuPDF, PyPDF2, and Tesseract achieving 98%+ accuracy and reducing cleanup by 60%.
● Used OpenAI LLMs for skill extraction, matching, and cover-letter generation, reducing review time by ~75%.
● Designed a low-latency FastAPI RESTful backend with MongoDB and an HTML/CSS/JS frontend, managing 10,000+
records and delivering analysis in <150 ms.

Nov 2025 - Dec 2025
● Built an end-to-end MLOps pipeline using TF-IDF + Logistic Regression to classify 5 ticket types with 93% accuracy.
● Implemented MLflow tracking and model registry, logging 20+ runs with metrics, parameters, and artifacts.
● Built and containerized a FastAPI inference service with Docker, delivering sub-200 ms predictions across environments.
● Designed a modular CI/CD training workflow using GitHub Actions, automating retraining and boosting experimentation
efficiency by 40%.
Spam Email Classifier | Python, NLP, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, Matplotlib, Seaborn | GitHub
July 2025
● Built a spam-email classifier with a team of 3 using Python and Scikit-learn, reaching 98% accuracy on 5,500 emails.
● Developed an NLP + TF-IDF preprocessing pipeline that improved model performance by ~12% over baseline.
● Addressed class imbalance with class weighting and SMOTE, increasing minority-class recall by 22%.
● Visualized model results using Matplotlib/Seaborn, producing ROC curves and confusion matrices with AUC 0.99.
